intro: Secacah was a city in the wilderness district of Judah listed in Joshua 15:61 among six towns in the sixth district of the tribal territory. Its exact location has not been established with certainty, though some scholars associate it with Khirbet es-Samrah in the Buqei'a valley west of the Dead Sea. Secacah appears only in this inventory list and plays no other role in the biblical narrative.
